textByHashes.62c2498ee4bfa8117b802e51a491876a61bde3d9: Hey, are you wanting to try some of my fine wines and spirits? All brewed locally on Karamja island.
textByHashes.967d07852f906b9073994106d2348b7156c6d373: Ah, you'll be wanting some Ape Bite Liqueur then. It's got a lovely banana taste, and it'll only cost you 7 coins.
